description_long: This house is a modern, two-story residential building with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of light and dark surfaces, with prominent use of white and beige walls accented by black window frames and trim. Large rectangular windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is surrounded by a paved driveway and walkway, with landscaped greenery and numerous trees creating a suburban feel. The main entryway is defined by a small porch and steps, flanked by decorative plants and illuminated by exterior lighting. The overall layout suggests a contemporary architectural style with an emphasis on open space and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a mix of white, beige, and black exterior finishes, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, porch, and a clear view of the driveway and landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, backyard area, and dense tree coverage behind the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the mix of window sizes, beige and white wall sections, and the continuation of the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the house's geometric lines, flat roof, and the arrangement of trees and paved surfaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, decorative plants, and exterior lighting, featuring a modern door and minimal overhang.
